_comment: Edit this file to add/remove brands or tune category keywords. slug must be filesystem-safe (lowercase, hyphens).
_listing_url_note: Optional. A real product-listing/bestsellers page sampled for trading data (price distribution + how much of the range is on sale). Best-effort: if it 404s, blocks us or has no readable prices, the brand simply gets no `listing` block that day -- the homepage capture is unaffected. Tune these to each brand's best 'shop all' page.
_review_platforms_note: Optional list of review/trust platforms a brand is KNOWN to use (e.g. Feefo). Many homepages inject the review widget client-side, so the platform name never appears in the server HTML and detection alone would false-negative it. Declared platforms are merged with whatever is detected, so a confirmed signal is never dropped.
_price_exclude_note: Optional per-brand price-scan overrides. A generic filter already keeps non-standalone add-ons (photo cards, gift wrap, e-gift extras) out of the floor/median price; `price_exclude_keywords` (product-title substrings) and `price_exclude_values` (exact GBP amounts) catch anything brand-specific it misses.
timezone_note: The daily job runs at 08:00 UTC = 09:00 UK summer (BST) / 08:00 UK winter (GMT). Change cron in .github/workflows/daily.yml to adjust.
